/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fftreal_vector.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libfftreal_vector.so -o libfftreal_vector.so CMakeFiles/fftreal_vector.dir/fftreal_vector_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fftreal_vector.dir/fftreal_vector.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
